arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hints at double Arsenal transfer exit as William Saliba injury update delivered after Newcastle win
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta hints at two imminent Arsenal exits following the Gunners' 1-0 victory over Newcastle United in their final Premier League home game of the season.

arts.ttl: Trophyless again, Arsenal need a lift despite win over Newcastle
arts.sum: Arsenal's win over Newcastle all but confirms second place, but another trophyless season is taking its toll.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice’s stunning strike secures Arsenal’s Champions League place
arts.sum: Rice delivered from range with 55 minutes gone.
